programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Man-eating House
programme.desc: Jim, Artie, and a sheriff are accompanying a prisoner through the swamps when they take refuge in an abandoned house... haunted by the spirit of a dead woman.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "A little girl, crying each night, appears to be a ghost from The Donner Party. Many people hear her, but she appears each night to Charlie, who questions his own sanity."

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Two men are found hung, and a note left by each of them claims a third person will die: Victoria Barkley.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt tries to ease the tension between a rancher and her son.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe is about to shoot what he thinks is a wolf but discovers it is a woman. She turns out to be a gypsy banished by her people because they believe she is possessed by the devil.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas thinks he has seen a ghost when a young man, eerily similar to a man he killed in the Civil War, challenges him to a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Favor finds a circus that is lost. Pascal, the owner and clown, beats his wife, Jenny, who wants to run away with Dario, the other half of her high wire act.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: When Paladin finds a woman and her apparently typhoid-afflicted child abandoned by a wagonmaster, he enlists the aid of a female doctor from a nearby town, but a religious fanatic then tries to bar them from entry.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: In Mexico, Josh protects a sensible man and his pregnant wife. The villagers are angered because the man threw the town "witch" off his property.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Dutiful But Dumb, Busy Buddies, Booby Dupes, Tooth Will Out, Booty And The Beast, Pardon My Backfire
programme.desc: "The Stooges are photographers for Whack magazine ("If it's a good picture it's out of Whack") who, after messing up an assignment, are sent to the country of Vulgaria to get a picture of a death ray gun. In Vulgaria the penalty for taking pictures in is death, and the boys soon wind up in front of a firing squad. Curly's last request is a giant cigar and by the time he's done smoking it all the soldiers are asleep and the Stooges make their escape. , The Stooges run a small restaurant, and must come up with some quick money to pay off a pie dealer whose wares they ruined. They enter Curly in a milking contest at the county fair, but his technique leaves something to be desired, and he quickly falls behind the champ. Moe and try to help by putting on a cow suit and pouring milk from a concealed bottle, but when their cheating is exposed, they must leave on the run. , The Stooges are auto mechanics who need money so they can marry their girls. When some escaped convicts pull into their garage, the boys manage to capture them and use the reward money to marry their sweethearts. , The Stooges are three fish peddlers who decide to cut out the middleman by catching their own fish. They trade their car and $300 for a "new" boat, which turns out to be a piece of junk that soon falls apart and sinks in the middle of the ocean. Luckily the boys also have a rowboat, which they climb into and then try to signal some passing planes for help. Unfortunately, their paint-spattered rag is mistaken for a Japanese flag and they are bombed from the sky. , The Stooges graduate from dental school and go out west to open a practice. Everything goes well until Shemp "cures" an outlaw's toothache from the instructions in a carpentry book, and the boys must leave on the run. , The Stooges do a good turn and help a stranger open a safe in what they think is the man's house. Actually the man is a crook and the boys were unwitting accomplices to a robbery. Once they realize what's happened, the Stooges go after the bad guy and who's left on the train to Los Vegas. The boys trap the villain and recover the booty. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "After inheriting the Frankenstein Castle, a doctor who has tried all his life to distance himself from his notorious relative finds himself drawn to the unfinished work."

programme.title: House of Svengoolie
programme.desc: "Dr. Henry Frankenstein (Colin Clive) wants to build a man in his own image, using the body of a dead man. He and his assistent Fritz (Dwight Frye) dig up a freshly burried coffin and steal the body. When they realize the head and the brains of the body are severely damaged, they decide to steal a brain from Dr. Frankensteins former teacher Dr. Waldman (Edward van Sloan). When Fritz accidentely drops the glass jar with the label "good brain" on it on the floor, he decides to take the glass jar with the label "bad brain". Using some kind of mysterious ray that Dr. Frankenstein discovered, the body is brought to life during a thunderstorm, and the monster of Frankenstein (Boris Karloff) is born. Later, when Dr. Frankenstein realizes that he has created an agressive monster, he and Fritz lock the monster up in a cell. When the monster is repeatedly bullied and provoked by Fritz, the monster eventually manages to kill him. When the monster escapes, he meets a little girl playing near the water. The monster and the girl throw flowers in the water. Enjoying the playing, the clumsy monster proceeds to pick up the girl and throw her in the water, too. Later we learn that the little girl drowned in the incident, when her father carries her through the streets. The city's population propel into an uproar, demanding the death of Frankensteins monster. The monster is driven into an old mill, after which the people of the city set the mill on fire."

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: Penny and Judy stumble upon a mirror. Before they know it they are transported to the mirror universe which is occupied by only one person, a boy who is lonesome for companionship.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: Kowalski's brother, injured and unreasonable, nevertheless saves the Seaview crew from a deep-sea death.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: A pair of time travelers from Earth's distant future are sent back to the past by their superiors on a mission of observation. However, the pair use the trip to plot for the eventual takeover of Earth, using the castaways as unwitting accomplices.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: Warrior-prophet Joshua sends Tony and Doug into Jericho as spies before he attacks the Biblical city.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent recovers important information regarding the aliens just as a conspiracy targets his future.

programme.title: The Life and Times of Grizzly Adams
programme.desc: "A torrential rainstorm traps Adams and friends in his cabin overnight. The next day comes and it's time to repair it, but Ben the Grizzly has wandered off for the day."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin and Jim take us into one of the wildest areas of the natural wild kingdom in the U.S., the vast Everglades."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Even under searing temperatures of 120 degrees or more, life tenaciously takes hold in the Sonora Desert. This American Southwestern region is an arena of daily competition…between animals, plants and insects, struggling to survive the extremes and severities of the desert’s environment. It’s truly a “survival of the fittest,” and a ruggedly beautiful adventure. Marlin Perkins and Jim Fowler are there observing as predator hunts its prey, be it the grey fox, badger or sidewinder snake. Then you’ll be part of the intense excitement as a peccary…the only true wild pig in the United States…becomes the target of Marlin’s capture gun, which shoots a harmless, sleep-inducing drug into the animal. The peccary is then tagged, so that its habits may be more carefully studied, and that life, under the difficult circumstances of the Sonora, may be more clearly understood by man."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Many animals dwell in the wild kingdom that literally are ‘poles apart’ in structure, habits and adaptations. In the laboratory and in the wild, Marlin Perkins and Jim Fowler explore and explain such extreme contrasts such as: the slow heartbeat of the elephant and the rapid beat of a mouse; the alligators’ jaws built to crush and a tropical bird’s beak built to pry; birds that migrate and birds that ‘stay put’; a bird that flies a mile a minute and a sloth that travels a food a day."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Comparisons and contrasts are drawn as Marlin and Jim analyze the behavior of the lion in his natural habitat in Africa and in the zoo."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Rivers of fire and erupting volcanoes in British East Africa have created a crater called Ngora Ngora, which shields the great herds of African wildlife from the advances of man. By plane to the top of the crater and by jeep into the crater, we study one of the truly last strongholds of the wild kingdom."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "What happens to the creatures living in the wilderness when their natural habitat is destroyed? Some die out…others move to a new home, and some like the coyote and opossum have journeyed far beyond their original range. Others move in, attracted by food or by the elimination of their natural enemies. Camped in a wilderness area on the fringe of civilization, Marlin Perkins explores the why and hows of this cross-migration."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike and Carol agree to allow Marcia to have a slumber party and the boys plot a series of tricks. But after Marcia is accused of insulting her teacher with a sketch at school, the party is in danger of being cancelled.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia comes home from school in a daydream and the rest of the family can't figure out her problem. It seems Marcia has a crush on a boy who doesn't even know she's alive, at least not until she studies up on his favorite hobby, insect collecting. The next time she comes home from school, she has exciting news, he asked her to "go steady."

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Fonzie has to have his tonsils removed and will miss a big Halloween party.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley's friendship with a rich older man is resented by Carmine, who is jealous, and the man's daughter, Adelle, is suspicious of Shirley's intentions.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Jim Lindsey is a young guitarist that lives in Mayberry. When the famous musician Bobby Fleet and his band arrive in Mayberry, Andy and Barney scheme to arrest Bobby and his band so that Jim can get an audition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The show opens with the Ricardos and the Mertzes sitting around the Ricardos' piano, singing songs together. After the Mertzes leave, Lucy and Ricky wind up in an argument. The Mertzes, who are trying to get some sleep, are most irritated by the noise. They angrily phone the Ricardos and demand that they cut down on the racket. This, as you can imagine, leads to a big quarrel between the Ricardos and the Mertzes. Lucy and Ricky decide that they can't take it anymore, and they want to move out. However, there is a slight problem—they've signed a lease. The Ricardos thus decide to become the most undesirable tenants ever so that they can break that lease.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver has the chance to travel around the country for six weeks during the summer and he's all excited about it. However, he quickly realizes when he's gone Gilbert will go after the girl Beaver has a crush on, Mary Margaret. But he quickly realizes, there's more to life than Mary Margaret.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver's school is having a clothing drive and whoever brings in the most clothes will be awarded 1,000 school points. June, Ward and Wally round up all the old clothes they can find and put them in a box. However, next to the box are three good suits of Ward's that are to be cleaned, and, of course, Beaver mistakes them as items for the clothing drive.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Pearl's efforts to snag Mr. Brewster seem doomed until he makes a ridiculous public proposal.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed is confronted with too many cooks and not enough vittles when he invites Pearl and Jethrine to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: Hot water spurting from beneath the island pleases the castaways as they can now have hot water piped into their huts.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.sub-title: Will The Real Mr. Howell Please Stand Up?
programme.desc: The radio reports that Mr. Howell has been rescued and is spending all of his money.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama has to keep her temper under control for two weeks if she wants to collect on Fran's will.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: A feud between Mama and Ellen rages—until she learns Ellen is in the hospital.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.sub-title: The Eyes Of Love / Masquerade / Hollywood Royalty (part 1)
programme.desc: "Part 1. Thieves eye a honeymooning actress's gems; a man encounters his blind childhood love; a wife meets her spouse's mistress."

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker, the local pharmacist's niece, comes to Mayberry to replace him on a temporary basis. Her "new" approach to dispensing medicine shakes things up in Mayberry.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "Frankenstein collector Phil Meenan's collection starts with the range of tattoos covering his head, and extends to nearly every inch of his home. Horror expert Phil Munis is on hand to appraise the Franken-treasures, from its monstrously oversized Mardi Gras mascot head to a prop wire from the actual lab used in the original 1931 movie."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: It's Halloween at the 4077th, and the staff dons costumes and trades ghost stories. Father Mulcahy discovers a soldier alive that had been pronounced dead.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th is designated as the setting for the making of an army film on Mobile Army Surgical Hospital units. Hawkeye is chosen as the star while Margaret and Frank compose a screenplay. Hawkeye objects to the piece of propaganda that filmmaker Lt. Bricker is producing and, having exposed the original film, reshoots a new one his way.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria's sex life suffers after they have to begin planning their encounters around the baby's feeding schedule.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie baptizes Baby Joey without Mike and Gloria's permission.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A broken furnace forces Archie and Edith to spend a few nights under the Stivic's roof during a power blackout.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: One Sunday afternoon, Archie comes home from the laundromat in fury. It seems that he overloaded one of the machines causing the machine to eat his clothes and cause a flood. The irate proprietor of the laundromat, soon stops by the Bunker home to get Archie to pay for the damages but Archie refuses. Soon Edith is called in to act as judge to decide who is at fault in the matter.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray begins to doubt if anyone actually tells the truth.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray tries to juggle the responsibilities of home and work.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.sub-title: It May Look Like A Walnut!
programme.desc: Rob falls asleep with a sci-fi movie on and gets visited by an alien from another planet.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob, Laura, Buddy and Sally spend the night in a seemingly haunted cabin.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: When the Kramdens and Nortons enter a Raccoon costume contest a feud arises between Ralph and Ed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man finds that he can trade anything he has, including youth and personality, with anybody else.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A small-time crook cooks up a scheme for getting rich quick.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man's belief in a faith healer leads to an interesting situation for both of them.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Kroll and Stevens run the Northeast Syndicate and the IMF must bring them down. In '37 the two of them killed a rival mobster, hid the body and killed the witnesses, so the IMF needs to get Kroll to lead them to the remains.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A scam artist posing as a psychic goes on TV to prove that he knows where Kimble will appear next-with a little help from an accomplice who is traveling with Kimble.

programme.title: Harry O
programme.desc: "Harry Orwell goes undercover to expose a powerful auto theft organization and quickly becomes involved in murder, blackmail and illicit narcotics."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Posing as orange growers, Friday and Gannon attempt to bust a gambling operation.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Gary Crosby plays a hippie whose wife has been persuaded—by other hippies—to pass bad checks.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed participate in the search for two black militants who ambush and critically wound two officers in their patrol car. When one of the suspects subsequently dies in custody, a bitter public relations battle begins with the militant group as the search for the other suspect continues.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: A young employee at the city garage steals a patrol car and engages in a high speed pursuit. Afterward, Malloy and Reed arrest a young woman trying to cash an old-age benefits check she found on the ground, report to an apartment complex garage that had its security camera stolen, investigate a break-in at a mortuary and arrest a couple of pill pushers at a warehouse in Officer Ed Well's territory.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Toon In With Me's Boo-Bash begins with a look back on some seriously spooky traditions."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: While cleaning, June runs across an old family scrapbook and gathers the family together to reminisce about the past six years. The Cleavers recall scenes from previous episodes including: 'Beaver Gets 'Spelled,'' 'New Neighbors,' 'My Brother's Girl,' 'The Shave,' 'Beaver Runs Away,' 'Larry Hides Out,' 'Teacher Comes to Dinner,' and 'Wally's Election.'

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "Beaver's teacher, Miss Canfield, sends a note home with Beaver and the other kids convince him that it's news that he's getting kicked out of school. So Beaver and Wally take steps to hide the note from Ward and June."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Caretaker's Cat
programme.desc: Wealthy Peter Baxter decides to test the loyalty of his heirs. He pretends to change his will cutting them all out and leaving his entire estate to groundskeeper James Hing.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock goes back to his hometown for a family reunion, but things turn sticky when a good friend of his nephew's son dies, and his rival is charged with murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Racial tensions run high when a white cabbie is murdered in the bottoms.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The parents who work at Picket's defense plant leave their children in the parking lot while the parents work

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Elderly Panacea Sykes is a conniving thief bent on robbing Kitty.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After Joe marries Alice Harper, trouble follows when a couple of men show up looking for money owed to them by Alice's brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to do a good deed for the old town drunk but it backfires when the drunk's son believes he inherited Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A dance hall singer asks Lucas to care for her daughter in an effort to hide the baby from her self-righteous, bigoted father.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Judge Clay and his family join the wagon train. He has a reputation for cleaning up frontier towns, but his fanatical attention to the law sees him ostracized as often as he is praised. He must face this when his son must be tried by him."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: "Seeing a dire need in the community for on-the spot medical assistance, Roy and John attempt to convince their staunchest opponent, Dr. Brackett, to support paramedic legislation that means getting help to where it's needed most. Martin Miller and Kent McCord of Adam-12 guest star in this thrilling 2-hour pilot movie"

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When Henry goes for some R&R, Hawkeye pretends to crack up so that Frank will let him and Trapper go on some R&R.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: John Hodges, a chopper pilot referred to as The Cowboy, has been hit in the shoulder, and arrives at the 4077th. He is expecting a letter—he's worried that his wife, Jean, is leaving him for another man. He wants to go home, but Henry refuses, stating Cowboy's wound isn't serious enough to merit a stateside ticket. Bad luck then follows Henry Blake like the seat of his pants!

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When Col. Henry Blake is transferred to Tokyo and Frank starts imposing military discipline on the camp, the surgeons will do anything to get Henry back.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A rash of thefts breaks out in the camp. Missing pieces include Frank's silver picture frame, Margaret's hair brush and Trapper's watch. The camp is searched and everything is found in Hawkeye's locker.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy comes to believe that Ellie is a "deadly female hunter" out to marry him so he tries to put her onto other quarry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie becomes friends with an eight-year-old runaway.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is reluctant to go on a date because he's insecure.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra gets upset when she discovers that she's driving Ray's old "make out mobile."

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan helps three German scientists escape to England.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan schemes to get a French courier and some Allied bulletproof vests out of Germany.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Ken Berry And Cass Elliot (part 1)
programme.desc: "Guests Ken Berry and Cass Elliot. Originally aired on 10/13/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Deadly Debt
programme.desc: A man suspects his father was killed by a gangster to whom he owed $10,000. When the gangster turns up dead, the timing couldn't be worse for the bereaving son.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: Number Twelve Looks Just Like You
programme.desc: In a future where everyone must undergo an operation at the age of 19 to make them identical to everyone else, one woman desperately tries to hang on to her own identity.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: On the run from the law, an escaped convict kidnaps a young woman.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man plans to cheat an insurance company out of a large amount of money.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix travels to a Latin American country and gets himself involved with a revolution against its dictatorship.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon is hired when the only witness to a robbery is a young child who blames an Arabian heir for the crime."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: An affair leads to an accidental murder.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A girl's life hangs in the balance as the detectives search for the dog that bit her.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An infant girl is found in a garbage can; Joe and Bill use the child's blanket to track down the mother.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are called to a tavern robbery in progress, and then are jolted by a severe domestic abuse situation they are powerless to stop. In the meantime, they lose track of a naive college girl who has just been carjacked by a convicted rapist.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Because Malloy has allowed his driver's license to expire, Reed has to do the driving on today's busy patrol. They search for an ice cream truck driver who's been trying to sell marijuana to children, get an unexpected reaction from a bank robber, help a man who's had his house completely emptied by his neighbors, deal with a woman who shoots her husband dead and find a live baby in a trashcan.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Toony and Bill retell classic horror tales of Edgar Allan Poe."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver and Wally send away for an alligator and they secretly keep it in the bathroom. When the alligator falls ill, the boys get some advice from Captain Jack, an owner of an alligator farm. However, keeping him a secret is going to be hard; the alligator is growing and they need a new place to keep him without June and Ward finding out.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver comes home with a black eye and Ward is upset when he learns that Beaver didn't fight back. This leads Ward to teach Beaver how to defend himself. Little does Ward know, the person who punched Beaver is a girl, Violet Rutherford, the daughter of one of Ward's co-workers.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Stuttering Bishop
programme.desc: Bishop Arthur Mallory is met in his hotel room by Wallace Lang, an associate of a wealthy man named Charles Burroughs. He is warned through physical violence to stop looking for Burroughs' granddaughter.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock goes back to his hometown for a family reunion, but things turn sticky when a good friend of his nephew's son dies, and his rival is charged with murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Harriet's sister is murdered on the orders of the wealthy white man who fathered her child.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Film makers film a documentary at Picket's Plant and make Erin the "star"". "

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A girl Chester likes has no idea that the man she has her eye on is already married.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After Joe marries Alice Harper, trouble follows when a couple of men show up looking for money owed to them by Alice's brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes involved in a battle between an aspiring writer and a cocky, bragging trail boss.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "A young lieutenant on his first assignment must face an overbearing, murderous sergeant who is determined to kill two deserters in cold blood. The sergeant wounds Chris thinking he is one of them and into a feud with Flint at the train."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: John plots his revenge after being the repeated target of practical jokes. A man breaks his back falling off a tower. A woman fakes an illness. Dr. Early's stethoscope becomes lodged in his ear. A man brought into the hospital from a movie set is the first indication of an outbreak of botulism. A boy is trapped in a condemned building.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye moves a wounded North Korean soldier into The Swamp, rather than let him be shipped out before he's stable. During the night he and Trapper play Dracula, and siphon off a pint of Frank's blood. The soldier then contracts hepatitis, so they have to test Frank without him knowing, and have to keep him away from Margaret and the patients.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The nurses go to extreme lengths to find a date for Nurse Eddie—they won't go out with anyone until Eddie gets a date. The men draw straws, and Hawkeye is the big loser, especially after Eddie nearly kills him in a scene resembling teenage "mating" rituals.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar gets a Dear John recording from home. Hawkeye and Trapper try to set him up with a date, but fail. Radar is taken by a new nurse at the camp and she is into poetry and music, so they coach him. Margaret wants to stop the relationship, so Hawkeye and Trapper get between her and Frank until she relents. Radar's "Ahhhh, Bach!" and "That's highly significant" quotes win him the girl.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye creates a fake doctor, Captain Jonathan S. Tuttle, to give supplies to the local orphans. Henry wants Tuttle to be officer of the day, so Hawkeye creates a fake personnel file, and all his back pay is given to the orphanage. When General Clayton wants to reward his generosity, Hawkeye is forced to invent a story about Tuttle jumping from a chopper without his parachute!

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, trying to lift Barney's spirits, stages a minor robbery and tries to match his deputy with a shy seamstress.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy becomes upset when Opie contributes a measly three cents to the Underprivileged Children's drive.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray discovers the diamond in Debra's wedding ring is fake.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and his family find themselves arguing about honesty.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to destroy a counterfeiting operation that has been set up in camp.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A prisoner offers the Nazis information on Hogan's operation in exchange for his freedom.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Ken Berry And Cass Elliot (part 2)
programme.desc: "Guests Ken Berry and Cass Elliot. Originally aired on 10/13/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Gambling Lady
programme.desc: Counterfeit casino chips and chronic gambling lead to murder, and Mason suspects one of his clients may be culpable.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three tough-looking, motorcycle-riding men disrupt a peaceful suburb when they move in. Yet, their neighbors could never imagine just how dangerous these men really are.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: An attorney seeks the truth more for his own satisfaction than the pursuit of justice.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: An advertising executive is on the verge of being fired when he can't sell a new product.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix travels to a Latin American country and gets himself involved with a revolution against its dictatorship.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon is hired when a crusading newspaper editor is found near a dead body, while drunk and unconscious in a hotel room."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby is used to smuggle narcotics.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon track down a department store employee who stole $100,000 worth of merchandise in six months.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives search out the suppliers of stolen arms for paramilitary groups.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: After beginning the search for a well known suspect who just stole a 600-pound offset printing press, Reed and Malloy try to convince an 85-year-old man to leave the soon-to-be demolished apartment building where he's resided alone for 27 years. Afterward, they pull over a very unusual vehicle, and chase a delivery truck to the end of an unfinished bridge.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are called to a riding stable run by retired actor Slim Berkeley. The owner is careless about trusting people and has $100 and a gold belt buckle stolen. Because of a criminal record in New York his young assistant runs, but when searched nothing is found. A call to a phone booth where the man inside is being attacked leads to a drug arrest and sore jaw for Reed. Reed spots a robbery at a drive-in resulting in a shoot-out.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: The Cleavers have new neighbors, the Donaldsons, and June sends Beaver over to welcome them with a vase of flowers. However, when Mrs. Donaldson thanks Beaver by kissing him on the cheek, Beaver becomes convinced that Mr. Donaldson will kill him because he let a married woman kiss him, and it's all thanks to Eddie Haskell, who planted that idea in Beaver's mind.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June has had it with Wally and Beaver's fighting and demands they make a pact to be nice to one another and do things together. However, when each boy gets an invitation for individual social outings, they each attempt to break the pact.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lost Last Act
programme.desc: Playwright Ernest Royce is found shot to death in the same manner as a character in one of his un-produced plays. The play deals with characters very close to real people and the real-life murder of a New York underworld figure.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Matlock goes after serial killer Jeffrey Speidel, the maniac plans to first ruin Matlock publicly and then murder the famed attorney.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Willins reveals Trundel's motive; and Sweet finds---and Trundel's wife sees---the missing photo.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy is still missing, but a publisher has his journal and wants to publish it

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Quint incurs the wrath of a widow he turned down.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When Ben helps out ex-con John Dundee readjust to the world, the matter becomes complicated by broken promises of the man who framed him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous buffalo hunter tries to goad Lucas into a shooting match.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "The wagon master encounters opposition when he calls a halt to the train due to weather. One group needs to push on due to an inheritance in California. Chris and Duke take them but Duke injures his foot forcing him to stay in a cabin."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: John delivers a cyanotic baby. The firemen give Roy a bad time about his cooking. A boy gets his hand stuck in a vase; John rescues a kid in handcuffs. A man repairing a washer gets an electric shock. The paramedics rescue a man trapped on a crane.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Trapper operate on a famous Colonel - after discovering that he is particularly ruthless about sacrificing his men, they come up with a scheme to get him sent back to the states with a little unwitting help from Frank, Margaret, and a drunk Henry.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank throws his back out while spending the evening with Margaret, and ends up in traction. He promptly applies for the Purple Heart, having been 'technically' wounded at a frontline unit. Tommy Gillis, an old friend of Hawkeye's, is writing a book about the war, and pays him a visit.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Once again, Hawkeye writes home to his father, telling him of the latest gossip: the camp gets a new surgeon, who turns out to be a fake; Hawkeye bets he can walk into the mess tent naked for lunch and no one will notice; and Radar cheats on his final exam.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The camp suffers from the severe cold, except for Hawkeye who has received some long johns from his father. They get passed around from person to person as a gift, a gambling stake, a trade, a bribe, stolen and given up to Father Mulcahy, who ends up giving them away.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy strives to end a long-running feud between two neighboring families.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie's decision to run for town council sparks a battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray agrees to become more upbeat.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray brings home a stray bulldog.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and Klink go to England to steal an allied airplane as part of Hogan's plan to expose Nazi spies in London.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tries to get a Russian pilot, who refuses to escape to London, back to Russia.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Peggy Lee And Dom Deluise
programme.desc: "Guests Peggy Lee and Dom Deluise. Originally aired on 10/20/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Duplicate Case
programme.desc: After his cheating wife's body is recovered from the burned-out department store where she worked, a man finds $72,000 in his briefcase.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mysterious phone calls haunt a disabled woman.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A teenage gang of robbers hits one household too many.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man's plan to run away with his company's funds encounters a small hitch.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix struggles to recall events that led to him being shot with his own gun.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "The accountant of Eden Corporation has disappeared and along with him three million dollars. Does unscrupulous branch manager Sheffield have to do with the plot? Cannon comes across a discovery and suddenly local reporter Julie Foster also plays an important role."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby matches wits with a debonair killer.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The problems of policemen's wives.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The police go after a college student who has turned to murder.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: There's been a rash of cracked safes in the area, and Malloy thinks the suspect is someone who lives in the neighborhood who now claims to be a reformed family man. In the meantime, he and Reed track down a female robbery suspect, who turns out to be a victim herself.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy stares down the barrel of a rifle during the search for gloved robbers who are able to make off with $500 from a tavern in a stolen car. He and Reed also try to apprehend a group of anti-semites before their repeated shakedown attempts cause further damage to a defiant Holocaust survivor.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Toony and Bill turn into classic monsters."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "Wally and his friends are trying to earn enough money to buy baseball uniforms so they put a plan into action by doing their chores at a slow pace in order to maximize their hourly pay. Meanwhile, Beaver, also wanting to be on the team, begins selling water to his family and neighbors."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver has a crush on his teacher, Miss Canfield. When Judy, Whitey and Larry tease him for being a "teacher's pet," Beaver tries to prove them wrong and places a spring snake in her desk. However, Beaver has second thoughts and becomes determined to remove the snake before she finds it.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Bedeviled Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. David Craig discovers that tapes of conversations with his psychiatric patients are missing and being used for blackmail purposes. When the suspected thief and blackmailer, Mark Douglas, turns up murdered, Craig is charged with the crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: After a bump on the head, Matlock dreams he's in the Old West—and Conrad is about to be lynched by an angry mob!

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Tibbs travels to Philadelphia to uncover the truth behind the apparent suicide of a friend who had knowledge of a police cover-up.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Ashley Longworth Jr returns to the mountain. He proposes to Erin and she accepts

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt comes face to face with the outlaw who saved his life long ago.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A boy is accidentally killed while performing the initiation for a secret club, and one of Jamie's friends is blamed for the death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it is Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: "Lucas is drawn to a young widow passing through town on her way to claim an inheritance, but others who covet it are trying to kill her."

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "The wagon train encounters Amos Billings who tells of a new road that might shorten their trip and avoid Indian trouble. Chris and Flint are very suspicious of the situation since the location has been a dead end."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Station 51 is called to fight a wildfire. John and Roy rescue an elderly woman and her sister, treat an injured fireman, deliver a baby, catch a looter and find a boy's lost dog.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The camp tunes into the Army/Navy football game, only to be shelled and have an unexploded bomb land in the middle of the compound. They ring around trying to identify the bomb, and the camp prepares for the worst. Hawkeye and Trapper are left the task of following instructions to disarm the bomb.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Frank argue over Frank's surgical ability. Hawkeye performs a difficult operation and the patient does not recover as he should. Hawkeye begins to doubt his ability and moves out of The Swamp. He decides to open up his patients again, and discovers a nick in the colon that even Frank admits anyone could have missed.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank's normal drone of verbal abuse upsets Ginger, so Hawkeye puts his arm in a cast while he is asleep. Frank puts in for a transfer, and after Franks tells Margaret he's leaving, she decides to leave as well. As a result, Col. Blake puts both Hawk and Trap on double post-op duty until he finds replacements for Majs. Burns and Houlihan.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: General Clayton calls to say that a ceasefire is to be declared. The camp celebrates, Klinger gives away his dresses and locals start to take pieces of the camp. But Trapper does not believe it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When a stranger comes to town, Barney and the people of Mayberry grow suspicious when he seems to know too much about them.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When a Hollywood film crew decides to use Mayberry as a backdrop for a movie, everyone in town begins to put on airs, risking the small-town charm that attracted the crew in the first place.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank's sawing and Marie's meddling bother the neighborhood.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is being interviewed by a psychotherapist for a book.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Posing as waiters, Hogan and the gang scheme to get rid of a room full of German generals.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The guys must smuggle a U.S. bomber crew out of camp while under surveillance by Hochstetter.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Tim Conway And Diahann Carroll (part 1)
programme.desc: "Guests Tim Conway and Diahann Carroll. Originally aired on 10/27/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Grinning Gorilla
programme.desc: A scientist involved in a lawsuit with his former housekeeper is found stabbed to death, and the housekeeper—though cornered by a loose gorilla—is present when the corpse is discovered.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A computer technician begins getting advice on his love life from Agnes, the computer he works with.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man and his lover decide to get rid of his wife.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man tries to hide the murder of his business partner.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix's police department pal, Lieutenant Malcolm, is a victim of a setup. The private eye tries to get to the bottom of things in order to clear his friend.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon is haunted by the memories of his time in the Korean War."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: The managers of a rock music star, whom they think drowned in his pool, cash in on his "tragedy""."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon recruit a woman cop to nab a burglar.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate cases in a hospital emergency ward.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed have a run-in with a suspected professional jewel thief and fear she will walk due to lack of evidence. They also find themselves in competition with a millionaire vigilante, who provides assistance with apprehending a drunk driver and ending a shootout, but seems destined to soon overstep the law.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are on the lookout for a hype who robbed a hand-made craft store run by elderly women, only to later return the money after robbing an antique store. In the meantime, they engage in a high-speed pursuit, and pull over a priest in possession of marijuana.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.sub-title: Do You Want To Play With Me?
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony discuss clowns and dolls."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally and his friends build a clubhouse, and Beaver wants to join. Although the dues are $1 for 8th graders, Beaver has to come up with $3 in order to join their club. How can Beaver earn the money?

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally and Beaver dread attending dance school, so when Wally suddenly takes a liking in it, June and Ward are dumbfounded. It seems Wally has developed a crush on a girl named Penny and Beaver soon feels neglected and left out when Wally begins spending all his time with her.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Howling Dog
programme.desc: Evelyn Forbes escapes from a mental institution only to be charged with murder. The key to the case is a dog that continues to howl no matter what.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a marriage counselor is murdered, Matlock must sort through a list of suspects including the man's coworkers and patients, as he was known to seduce the female half of the couples he treated.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Tibbs goes home to Philadelphia, where he's implicated in a cop's murder while probing his own cop friend's apparent suicide---all with Althea about to give birth.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A soldier is sending his wife mail, but getting no replies

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A widow returns Chester's affections.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben is taken as a hostage while inspecting conditions at a Nevada State Prison.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After a young stablehand kills a notorious gunslinger, he is baffled by the hostility of the townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to use trickery to obtain it.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "A teacher traveling with the wagon train encounters conflict when he become attracted to the daughter of a medicine man who has just joined the train. The man despises cowards and sees the teacher as one."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Roy talks down a boy in a plane after the pilot (his father) has a heart attack. The paramedics respond to an attempted suicide, an overturned truck and a teenage overdose victim.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Captain Kaplan is to be shipped home, but becomes paranoid that something will happen to him before he leaves. He takes the wheel of the jeep to drive to Kimpo himself, but crashes and ends up in plaster.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Brought on by Frank and Margaret's negative reports, General Clayton assigns a psychiatrist, Captain Hildebrand, to examine the 4077th M*A*S*H unit to see if it should be disbanded. Henry tells them to be on their best behavior, or else they will be split up. But the 4077th soon begins to act in their traditional, insane way.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: An inept North Korean pilot, known as 5 O'Clock Charlie, makes his daily attempt to bomb the ammo dump. Frank puts in a request for an anti-aircraft gun, which is granted when Charlie hits General Clayton's jeep. Frank takes charge of the gun, while Hawkeye and Trapper are determined to prevent him from using it, by getting rid of the ammo dump. Frank misses Charlie and destroys the dump.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar writes the weekly activity report: Hawkeye operates on a wounded prisoner who grabs a scalpel and attacks the doctors. Frank wants Klinger thrown out on a section 8, so Henry calls in a psychiatrist, Major Freedman. Hawkeye is attracted to a new nurse but thinks she is married. Trapper loses a patient who developed complications during the O.R. fracas with the wounded soldier.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ignoring his own advice to Opie, Andy plays fast and loose with the facts when trying to sell the old town cannon.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: After Andy teases the fairer sex about gossiping, Aunt Bee pulls a prank to prove that men are gossips, too.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra gets fed up with Ray's family intruding in her life.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is devastated when he discovers his family lied to him.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plays a waiting game with a German general. The scheming general has planted a rocket-fuel depot right outside Stalag 13 in hopes of trapping the area's resident saboteur, whom he suspects is Hogan.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Carter pretends to be a traitor so he can learn the location of a chemical plant.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Tim Conway And Diahann Carroll (part 2)
programme.desc: "Guests Tim Conway and Diahann Carroll. Originally aired on 10/27/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Wrongful Writ
programme.desc: After a young lawyer is framed for the murder of a man claiming to be a government agent, Mason must cull through witnesses to identify the killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After encountering a terrifying figure in black, a woman faces the biggest decision of her life.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A seedy character comes up with an amazing formula and then puts it to good use.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man's love for his pet dog leads to disaster.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix wonders why a seemingly open-and-shut case got dropped.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "A kidnapping with shady overtones compels a millionaire to hire Cannon for the investigation."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.sub-title: See Some Evil, Do Some Evil
programme.desc: A blackmailer and murderer pretends to be blind.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of Chester W. Farnsworth
programme.desc: Uncle Joe is convinced that the Shady Rest is haunted by a guest who visited 50 years ago, Chester W. Farnsworth.
